expectations.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
expectations.evidence: Skill tool invoked with args 'Compose LaunchedEffect key recomposition side effects' — full retrieval pipeline: hot.md scan, index pass, 3 full page reads.

expectations.text: Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
expectations.evidence: Query 'Compose LaunchedEffect key recomposition side effects' matches routing table entry verbatim.

expectations.text: Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Cites [[Compose Side Effects]], [[Coroutines in Compose]], [[Compose Recomposition and Stability]] by name. Quotes key rules directly from page content (e.g., 'LaunchedEffect(true) or LaunchedEffect(Unit) = runs once for composable's lifetime').

expectations.text: Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Correctly diagnoses wrong key (password state object changes on every keystroke → new key → LaunchedEffect restart), provides Unit fix, explains why passwordValue must not be a key.
